---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in LLM Wiki
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run command `...`
2. Observe `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened. Include any error messages, stack traces, or unexpected output.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, Windows 11]
- **Claude Code version**: [e.g. 2.1.118]
- **Shell**: [e.g. bash 5.2, zsh 5.9]
- **Installation method**: [e.g. npm global, homebrew, manual clone]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Screenshots, log files, or steps you have already tried are helpful.
